Contact  Us
PHONE
TEXT
(619) 287-7555
(619) 202-8365
Commercial and multi-family dumpster collection 
service will not be performed on the holidays listed 
below, resulting in a one-day delay in service.
• New Year’s Day
• Thanksgiving Day
• Christmas Day
For all other holidays, collection will take place on 
regularly scheduled service days. Holidays which 
fall on a Saturday or Sunday DO NOT delay waste 
removal services for the remainder of the week.
HOLIDAY SCHEDULE
edcodisposal.com
ADDRESS
6670 Federal Blvd., Lemon Grove, 91945
